content.en:
When it comes to the innate multi-dimensional Dao body, the Lord of the Moon Realm is also very envious and eager.

"The innate multi-dimensional Dao body is a very powerful physique, and it is rumored that some special innate multi-dimensional treasures can help the transcendental realm to give birth to an innate multi-dimensional dao body, but it is just a rumor, and I don't know very well. There are also some sons and heirs of strong people who will also inherit the innate multi-dimensional Dao body of their fathers, but those strong people are afraid that they are in the sixth or even seventh realm, which is not something we can imagine. "

"There is another one, which is to cultivate the innate multi-dimensional Dao body secret technique to condense the innate multi-dimensional Dao body, many powerful extra-dimensional realms will deduce and create the innate multi-dimensional Dao body secret technique, but most of the created secret techniques are incomplete or have serious defects, and there is no way to practice the real innate multi-dimensional Dao body. And those who absorb the black fog have an innate multi-dimensional Dao body—the black fog multi-dimensional body!"

Referring to the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, the Moon Realm Lord shook his head, "The Black Mist Multidimensional Body is an innate multi-dimensional Dao body created by the Fifth Realm, and the one that has been circulated to the Five Thousand Territory is only a fragmented version, and the side effects are very large, in fact, the complete Black Mist Multidimensional Body also has huge side effects, and it is not a good thing to practice, maybe it will affect the future potential." However, once the Black Mist Multidimensional Body is cultivated, it can absorb the power of the Black Mist and strengthen itself. I once saw a third realm who had cultivated into a black mist multidimensional body, and resisted the attack of the fourth realm, but that third realm did not break through to the fourth realm in the end, and now it has disappeared, maybe it has long fallen. "

"The third realm resists the attack of the fourth realm?"

Ye Tian was very surprised, this is too mysterious!

He is very aware of the gap between the second realm and the third realm, if he faces any third realm, he will not be able to withstand a move, he will be instantly killed by the third realm, and the gap between the third realm and the fourth realm will only be greater.

But the third realm that has cultivated the black mist multidimensional body can withstand the attack of the fourth realm, which is very against the sky.

This is just a fragmented black mist multi-dimensional body, if it is a truly perfect innate multi-dimensional dao body, how terrifying its combat power is~ terrifying.

Just as Ye Tian was pondering, the Shangyue Realm Lord reminded: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, you have a high potential, and you are expected to be in the fourth realm in the future, don't destroy your future to cultivate the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, only some Third Realm that has no hope of breaking through itself will cultivate such a Black Mist Multi-dimensional Body-." "

"I understand!"

Ye Tian didn't say much, but he was very interested in the Black Mist Multidimensional Body.

Each of his duplicate bodies is a real body, and the cultivation of one of the duplicate bodies does not affect the other duplicated bodies, if he can enter the Black Mist Stone Statue to cultivate with the help of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, it is undoubtedly an extremely cost-effective thing.

Moreover, after practicing the black mist multi-dimensional body, it is equivalent to having a replica body that fights beyond the level, why not do it!

However, even a mutilated version of the Black Mist Multidimensional is bound to be extremely difficult to obtain.

If it was so easy to obtain, those second realms and even the third realms would definitely want to cultivate the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, after all, the Fourth Realm was out of reach, and it would never even be able to achieve it, so why not cultivate the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body!

However, the Black Mist Multidimensional Body is still so rare, it must be that the cultivation method is extremely precious, only a very few forces have it, and the cultivation difficulty is extremely high.

Ye Tian didn't ask the Moon Realm Lord where he had the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, and she definitely didn't know.

"The cultivation method of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body is only available on the side of the Five Thousand Territory. "

So, Ye Tian prepared to go to the Five Thousand Territory.

......

this day.

Ye Tian took the flight of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce to the territory of No. 500.

After a while, the territory of 5,000 arrived.

The prosperity of the 5,000 Territory is far from being comparable to the 6,000 Territory, and the number of extradimensional realms here is as large as the stars, and the number of the second and third realms is even more exaggerated.

Here, if you don't reach the third realm, you're not a strong person at all.

However, the number of the Fourth Realm is still scarce, most of the Fourth Realm has left here to explore the wider world, and only a very small number of forces have one or two Fourth Realms in charge.

Strictly speaking, the number of Fourth Realms remaining in the Territory of Five Thousand is only a dozen.

As for the fifth realm, there is really no one.

East Tong Boundary.

After he came here, he was going to find a place to use as his long-term cultivation mansion in the future.

Ask for flowers

Soon.

He chose a medium-sized giant city that was not very grand, and bought a small mansion here.

As for the opening of mansions outside the city, it is not allowed and is very dangerous. []

So, he simply bought a ready-made mansion here.

The giant city he chose was called Liuyang City, and the city lord was an existence in the late stage of the third realm, and his strength was naturally very strong, and although there were not many in the third realm of this city, there were dozens of them, and there were even more in the second realm.

The cultivation of Ye Tian's second realm peak was very conspicuous in the Six Thousand Territory, but it was not conspicuous at all here, and no one would specifically investigate him.

Ye Tian's copy body didn't stay with another copy body, and he didn't want the Moon Realm Lord to know that he was fighting the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, otherwise it would not be easy to explain.

After coming to Liuyang City, Ye Tian secretly investigated the black mist multi-dimensional body.

Although the wealth on his body is not much, but here in the Five Thousand Territory, he is even considered to be the more barren one at the peak of the Second Realm, but it naturally does not cost too many resources to find out the news.

And he is also slowly collecting resources, breaking into various resource treasures, sacrificing a replica body, thus obtaining a lot of good resources, and his net worth has naturally skyrocketed.

I have to say that the resources on the side of the 5,000 Territory are far from being comparable to the 6,000, even if the resources here are almost all occupied by the big forces, but the little resources that leak out of the fingernails are far from being comparable to the 6,000, and just obtaining a precious resource is comparable to all the net worth in the past.

However, even if he really encounters the cultivation method of the black fog multi-dimensional body, the wealth on his body may not be able to afford it, but at least he has to understand where the cultivation method of the black fog multidimensional body is, as for the wealth can be accumulated slowly!

The years passed, and before I knew it, more than a dozen extradimensional eras had passed.

And over the years, he has also learned more and more about the Five Thousand Realms, and has also known some second realms, but these second realms have hardly heard of or know about the black mist multidimensional body.

However, on this day, a piece of news attracted Ye Tian's attention.
